catalog.meta_description: A standalone exhaustive catalog of world countries and flags, extracted from Atlas Guesser.
catalog.title: Every country and flag, in one searchable catalog
catalog.description: Discover every country in one beautifully simple, searchable place — explore flags, capitals, regions, and key facts from around the world with ease.
catalog.catalog_intro: Exhaustive list powered by the world-countries dataset and country flag assets.
catalog.search_placeholder: Search by country, code, capital or region
catalog.empty_state: No countries match the current filters.
catalog.stats_regions_helper: Africa, Americas, Antarctica, Asia, Europe and Oceania
catalog.sources_intro: Data and visual assets used on this page:
catalog.sources_world_countries: Country names, codes, regions, capitals and language metadata.
catalog.sources_flags: SVG flag assets used for country flag rendering.
catalog.sources_map: Country silhouettes and world geometry used for the mini map shapes.
catalog.sources_population: Population figures used in the catalog's population field.
